docs.title: Weathering-mediated bedrock erosion
docs.text:
Summary: Tools for simulating the weathering-mediated erosion of bedrock.

Figure 1: Graph of erosion rate vs weathering number

docs.title: Abstract
docs.text:
Exploration of weathering-driven weakening on rock erosion. The focus is on environments with no soil accumulation: for example, on steep bedrock channel walls.

The current treatment is 1d only, and it assumes an exponentially decaying weakening profile with depth into the rock. The code is provided as a Python package and Jupyter notebooks.
